note: Trained in two phases: (1) paper-2001 + win=+2/loss=-1 + max-sigma 0.5 + pop 30 + curriculum 0:3,20:4,80:5,180:6 for 200 gens; (2) resumed and ran 40 more gens at flat depth 6 from best_gen0200.pt. The depth-6 finishing phase added meaningful play strength: gen 240 beats the previous shipped Enhanced (pop-15 gen 200) by 18-10 in 28 decisive games over 150 head-to-head games (~64% win rate, ~91% confidence), and beats shipped paper-strict by 32-1-27 in 60 games. Sigma stayed bounded (max 0.065).
